instruction: Discuss the potential impact of this vulnerability using appropriate acronyms.
input: The AES instructions on the ARMv8 platform do not have an algorithm that is 'intrinsically resistant' to side-channel attacks. NOTE: the vendor reportedly offers the position 'while power side channel attacks ... are possible, they are not directly caused by or related to the Arm architecture.'
output: This vulnerability could lead to unauthorized disclosure of information, possibly compromising the Confidentiality (C) of data processed using the AES instructions on the ARMv8 platform.
